exploration_notes: Complete trace of the terraform plan pipeline: PlanCommand.Run() -> Meta.RunOperation() -> Local.Operation() -> opPlan() -> localRunDirect() (creates Context+PlanOpts) -> Context.Plan() -> planWalk() -> planGraph() (builds PlanGraphBuilder with 28 ordered transformers) -> Graph.Walk() which concurrently executes nodes. Provider nodes (NodeApplyableProvider) execute first via graph dependencies, calling InitProvider then ConfigureProvider. Resource nodes (NodePlannableResourceInstance) execute ma
